title: Christmas Star Tree Topper, Lighted Christmas Tree Topper, Hollow Gold Lighted Tree Star, LED Light Up Xmas Tree Topper, Christmas Tree Decorations (Silver, 17cm*10cm*10cm)
features: High-quality: The Christmas star tree topper is made of premium metal and copper wire with a stable winding method. It will maintain the most perfect state to accompany you through this wonderful Christmas and even the entire winter

Battery Operated: With LED lights around the star. This star topper is battery operated, no plug and extension cord need, which allows you to apply the lights indoor or outdoor, 2* AA batteries needed (not include)

Christmas Tree Topper Decoration: Star Christmas tree topper features five-pointed star shape, twinkle and sparking on the Christmas tree top, decorate your Christmas tree perfectly. Bring a rich and warm glow to your Christmas tree with this tree topper

Durable and Reusable: Easy to plug the star tree topper form the tree top. The cone base fits for almost all Christmas trees and maintains a perfect posture even if the tree is shaking. You can simply install, then enjoy the stars tree topper all season

Wonderful Christmas Decor: This star is the perfect way to complete the decoration of your Christmas tree. No one could miss the star decoration on the top of Christmas day. DIY your own tree decoration now
description: Product Description Christmas Star Tree Topper, Lighted Christmas Tree Topper, Hollow Gold Lighted Tree Star, LED Light Up Xmas Tree Topper, Christmas Tree Decorations Christmas Tree Topper with Lights Star Christmas tree topper features five-pointed star shape, twinkle and sparking on the Christmas tree top, decorate your Christmas tree perfectly. Bring a rich and warm glow to your Christmas tree with this tree topper Easy to plug the star tree topper form the tree top. The cone base fits for almost all Christmas trees and maintains a perfect posture even if the tree is shaking. You can simply install, then enjoy the stars tree topper all season Color: Gold, Silver Power Supply: Battery Operated Battery: 2* AA Batteries Needed (Not Included) Size: 17*10*10cm / 6.69*3.94*3.94inches Lighted Christmas Tree Topper
